title: Tabulation characters should be avoided
description: Tabulation characters should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?The tab width can differ from one development environment to another. Using tabs may require other developers to configure their environment (text editor, preferences, etc.) to read source code.That is why using spaces is preferable.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Tabulation characters should not be used - prefer spaces for consistent formatting

never_trigger_on: Not applicable - rule targets any tab character
logic.reasoning: Detects tab characters in source code which can cause inconsistent formatting across different editors.
